title: Repealed
doc_html:
§3698. Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 648, §3, eff. July 1, 2015.

            Acts 2011, No. 399, §1, eff. July 1, 2011; Acts 2014, No. 648, §3, eff. July 1, 2015.
